title: Ducks & Decor
description: Minecraft mod that adds silly ducks and slick decor
body:
![A lot of the blocks and item from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd61084ed48c03419b04a2b033e3094644178f2c.png)
- Various decorative blocks including alternating tiles, stones with sigils, batteries, darker bricks, statues, stuff made from dinosaur bones, duck metal, dark world grass, LittleBigPlanet bounce pads, Ghost Croquet Pipes, and more
  
- Adds like 15 or so paintings
  
![a few ducks around a fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc9fd22e0def41a3d890dbbf73fcad96100659d1.png)
- Adds 11 new mobs, you can probably guess 

- New fossil blocks
- Quack key
- 'Armor'
- 'Tool'
  
![A duck standing next to the new fyrestone ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ece8b6e521a27fbbb06d6f9f34a515151b17ea1e_0.webp)
- New Nether ore, "Fyrestone", which can be used to make specialized equipment 
- New music disc

- Many new advancements to aim for
- Items sorted into separate creative tabs for ease of access
- Various secrets, decorations, and friends to aid your survival or creative experience
- And more planned for the future

Updates:
- 2.4 Duckmas Miracle 2(2/25/24)
- 2.3 Duckmas Miracle 1(2/25/24)
- 2.2 Duck Block'd (5/13/24)
- 2.1 ___ROBOT RIOT____ (5/7/24)
- 2.0 [original release] (5/7/24)
- 1.0 [beta release] (1/18/24)

More updates planned: Yeah, might be awhile unfortunately


Mod is recommended 16+ because of slightly dark themes based in fantasy

Also this mod is technically called "dinos, ducks, and decor" but the amount of dino stuff got cut back considerably so... yeah.... can't change the project name...

thanks -Catsoulz
